2. travel_dates: 'September 15–19, 2024' — fully specified.
3. transportation: includes flight details (budget airline, economy, round-trip, from origin to Athens), costs (€140), and confirmation codes — fully specified.
4. accommodation: includes hotel name, description, rating, room type, dates, cost (€400), and confirmation — fully specified.
5. activities: list of activities with names, details, providers, dates/times, and costs — fully specified.
6. additional_services: includes meal arrangements with venues and cost, plus extras — fully specified.
7. total_budget: '€835' — fully specified.
All 7 items are present and fully detailed according to the required format.
